source_pr.title: planner: fix error when window function is used in view definition
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: guo-shaoge <shaoge1994@163.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #25929 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: We got error when add alias name for view definition when window function is used. Check the view definition, an extra column is added(`test.t6`). Becase the `addAliasName()` function should be called before `resolveWindowFunction()`.

    SELECT COUNT(1) OVER `w0` AS `COUNT(*) OVER w0`,COUNT(1) OVER `w` AS `COUNT(*) OVER w`,`test`.`t6`.`t` AS `t` FROM `test`.`t6` WINDOW `w0` AS (),`w` AS (`w0` ORDER BY `t`)

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: 
1. Change position `addAliasName()`


### Related changes


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Integration test


Side effects: none


### Release note

```
planner: fix error when window function is used in view definition
```

symptoms: tk.MustExec("CREATE VIEW v AS SELECT COUNT(*) OVER w0, COUNT(*) OVER w from t6 WINDOW w0 AS (), w AS (w0 ORDER BY t);") (planner/core/integration_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustExec("CREATE VIEW v AS SELECT COUNT(*) OVER w0, COUNT(*) OVER w from t6 WINDOW w0 AS (), w AS (w0 ORDER BY t);") (planner/core/integration_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: tk.MustExec("CREATE VIEW v AS SELECT COUNT(*) OVER w0, COUNT(*) OVER w from t6 WINDOW w0 AS (), w AS (w0 ORDER BY t);") (planner/core/integration_test.go).
fix_pattern: tk.MustExec("CREATE VIEW v AS SELECT COUNT(*) OVER w0, COUNT(*) OVER w from t6 WINDOW w0 AS (), w AS (w0 ORDER BY t);") (planner/core/integration_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustExec("CREATE VIEW v AS SELECT COUNT(*) OVER w0, COUNT(*) OVER w from t6 WINDOW w0 AS (), w AS (w0 ORDER BY t);") (planner/core/integration_test.go)
